# awscc_securityagent_target_domain (Resource)

Resource Type definition for AWS::SecurityAgent::TargetDomain



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `target_domain_name` (String) Domain name of the target domain
- `verification_method` (String) Verification method for the target domain

### Optional

- `tags` (Attributes List) Tags for the target domain (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the target domain was registered
- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.
- `target_domain_id` (String) Unique identifier of the target domain
- `verification_details` (Attributes) Verification details to verify registered target domain (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--verification_details))
- `verification_status` (String) Current verification status of the registered target domain
- `verified_at` (String) Timestamp when the target domain was last successfully verified

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Optional:

- `key` (String) The key name of the tag
- `value` (String) The value for the tag


<a id="nestedatt--verification_details"></a>
### Nested Schema for `verification_details`

Read-Only:

- `dns_txt` (Attributes) Represents DNS TXT verification details (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--verification_details--dns_txt))
- `http_route` (Attributes) Represents HTTP route verification details (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--verification_details--http_route))
- `method` (String) Type of domain ownership verification method

<a id="nestedatt--verification_details--dns_txt"></a>
### Nested Schema for `verification_details.dns_txt`

Read-Only:

- `dns_record_name` (String) Record name to be added in DNS for target domain
- `dns_record_type` (String) Type of record to be added in DNS for target domain
- `token` (String) Token used to verify domain ownership


<a id="nestedatt--verification_details--http_route"></a>
### Nested Schema for `verification_details.http_route`

Read-Only:

- `route_path` (String) Route path where verification token should be placed
- `token` (String) Token used to verify domain ownership

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.12.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `identity` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_securityagent_target_domain.example
  identity = {
    target_domain_id = "target_domain_id"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
### Identity Schema

#### Required

- `target_domain_id` (String) Unique identifier of the target domain

#### Optional

- `account_id` (String) AWS Account where this resource is managed
- `region` (String) Region where this resource is managed

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = awscc_securityagent_target_domain.example
  id = "target_domain_id"
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
$ terraform import awscc_securityagent_target_domain.example "target_domain_id"
```
